rules.rule: Tests must be written before implementation — failing test must exist first.
Test methods must follow Should{Outcome}_{Condition}Async naming pattern.
Each test must assert one specific behavior.
Tests must use mocks/fakes — never real infrastructure.
Failing test must be committed as {TestName} -> FAIL.
Passing implementation must be committed as {TestName} -> PASS.
Test classes must follow {SubjectUnderTest}Tests naming pattern.
Tests must cover happy path, validation failures, dependency failures, and service failures.
